title: Thursday, May 28, 2026
description: Tel Aviv weather, yesterday's market close, and your calendar for the day.
spoken_text:
Good morning, Sagee. It's Thursday, May twenty-eighth, twenty twenty-six.

Starting with the weather in Tel Aviv — it's a warm late-spring day. Currently around twenty-five degrees Celsius, partly cloudy with northwest winds and moderate humidity. Expect a high of twenty-nine degrees today, and a low of twenty-three tonight.

On the markets — yesterday's close was quiet, with mild declines across the board. The S and P 500 closed at seven thousand five hundred and five, down point one eight percent. The Nasdaq one hundred ended just under thirty thousand, at twenty-nine thousand nine hundred and seventy-four, off point zero nine percent. The VIX is at seventeen — calm. And the CNN Fear and Greed Index sits at sixty, which puts us firmly in Greed territory.

For your day — you have one item on the calendar: the Newborn Brain Society Educational Webinar at noon, running until one PM. Sujith Gurram will be presenting on reducing intraventricular hemorrhage in preterm infants through optimized inotropic support.

Today's thought is from Viktor Frankl: "When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves."

Have a great Thursday, Sagee.
